feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Get PDF Action in Sales Contract API | S4 Output | PDF to external system
entry.content:
Is it possible to enhance the Sales Contract API(SAP Business Accelerator Hub) to include a Get PDF action similar to what is avaialable in the Billing Document API?

Get PDF of Billing Document | SAP Help Portal

We are trying to send the form output generated from the Sales contract to an external system. We are able to easily do it for billing documents since the API has the standard operation for PDF but the same is not available for Sales Contracts.For output management,we are using S4 output.

entry.title: Determine number of times each HANA view has been executed, and by whom?
entry.content: I need to know the number of times each view in my HANA system has been executed over the last few months. I also need to know which users have executed those views. Is that possible? Does auditing need to be set up to obtain those metrics? If so, can someone direct me to practical examples? Best Practices and Recommendations for Creating Audit Policies is interesting but none of the examples seems to apply to what I'm trying to accomplish.

entry.title: What are the cases where homogenous graph and heterogenous graph should be used ?
entry.content:
Hi , In what cases do we use homogenous graphs and heterogenous graphs in SAP HANA DB.

Is there a performance difference in using homogenous and heterogenous graphs .

Any sample use cases for homogenous and heterogenous graphs would be very helpful.

Thank you

entry.title: S4 Hana Standard Change and Prerequisites
entry.content:
Hi, 

 

Does someone here know where can I get the list of standard change for S4 Hana (Standard for us is only small configuration that does not take more than 3 hours of work and has no to small impact in the system) and their prerequisites (complete info needed to make the standard change)?

Example is below:

1. Create a Storage 

Prerequisites: storage location code, description, plant

2. Create New Tax code

Prerequisites: Tax code, tax type, Tax rate, Country, Current code for reference

Thank you!

entry.title: Questions about CHECK_TABLE_CONSISTENCY
entry.content:
Here are the questions about CHECK_TABLE_CONSISTENCY.

Q1: How can I check if the table consistency check (CHECK_TABLE_CONSISTENCY) has been executed?

Q2: If it has not been executed yet, how can I execute it manually?

Q3: What is the impact on the HANA system if I do not execute CHECK_TABLE_CONSISTENCY?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: COP1 Transaction - error message VHUPD002 For the material no packing instructions could be found.
entry.content:
In S/4Hana the transaction COWBPACK will be replaced by COP1 or COP2.

In our project for Planned Handling Units out of production are following steps:

POP1: Create packing instructions

POF1: Determination of the packing instruction

COR01: Creation of a production order

CORK: Confirmation of the order 

COP1: Create Planned Handling Units – not working error message please see screenshot below

The error message has the number: VHUPD002

For the material no packing instructions could be found.

But if you see the process which I made material and packing instruction are linked and matched correctly.

How I can solve this problem in the system? What is missing?

Is there any specific customizing setting for this transaction COP1 in S/4HANA?

Thanks for your support.

entry.title: Intrastat not showing automatic CN
entry.content:
#HANA #Intrastat
We are issuing billings to our EU customers. At the same minute/ hour we issue also automatic credit note which is CN correction for price (rebate) - there is no returns only price correction. The problem is that those CN are not available in Intrastat dispatches nor in Intrastat Receipts. for this we use "value cr. rd. AutoCN" request.
I've read available documentation and I know what for CN/ DN if they are related to goods they will be available in Intrastat receipts. But my case is different and I am not sure how to see CN in Intrastat

entry.title: HCM Payroll PCR Attendance Bonus
entry.content:
The client wants to pay an attendance bonus based on the following conditions:

If an employee is present for the entire month – ₹1500.
If an employee takes one day of leave (paid/unpaid) – ₹1000.
If an employee takes two days of leave (paid/unpaid) – ₹500.
If an employee joins on the first day of the month – ₹1500.
If an employee joins on the first day of the month and takes one day of leave (paid/unpaid) – ₹1000.
If an employee joins on the second day of the month and takes one day of leave (paid/unpaid) – ₹500.
If an employee joins on the first day of the month and takes more than one day of leave – ₹0.
I have tried handling this through a PCR, but it is not considering employees who joined on the second day of the month.

How can I resolve this issue? Please suggest a solution

entry.title: Hi, I have sap learning hub access, and I am basis consultant,need help with finding practice syste
entry.content: • Hi, I have sap learning hub access, and I am basis consultant,need help with finding practice system so that I can practice kernel upgrade and stpi patches and certificate installation and sum tool and snotes and also for practice on hana db

entry.title: SAP CDS View Entity - Joining Table View
entry.content:
Hello *,
I am currently exploring the possibilities of SAP CDS View Entities and trying to replace various SQL statements in our coding with CDS View Entities to improve performance. In doing so, I have encountered several situations where the Open SQL statement (which we are using now) performs JOINs on table views (for example V_EQUI).

So far, I have not been able to integrate a JOIN on the view V_EQUI into a CDS View Entity. When I Use an ABAP CDS View instead, it works perfectly fine. Is it even possibleto JOIN a Table View when I use a CDS View Entity? If so, how can this be achieved?

 

My Examples:

ABAP CDS View (works fine):

define view YCDS_VIEW_TO_CDS as select from equi inner join v_equi on v_equi.equnr = equi.equnr { equi.equnr, v_equi.begru }

CDS View Entity (does not work):

define view entity YCDS_VIEW_TO_ENTITY2 as select from equi inner join v_equi on v_equi.equnr = equi.equnr { equi.equnr, v_equi.begru }

Thank you in advance!

Best Regards

Marius

ABAP Development

entry.title: Upgrade still running: Logon not possible
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

We recently attempted to update our system, but during the process, the SUM got stuck. As a result, we decided to remove the SUM directory and restore our database from a backup file. Now, we are unable to log in to the system and receive the error message: "Upgrade still running: Logon not possible." We can only log in using the DDIC user.

I have added the SUM directory back and tried unlocking the system with the command ./SAPup unlockshd S69, but I encountered the error: "Fatal Error: Unknown unlock option 'S69'."

Has anyone encountered this issue before? Any advice on how to unlock the system?

S/4 Hana 1809 FPS01 
DB: Hana 2.0

 

Thank you!

entry.title: Try with ./Sapup unlocksys
S4 Assign Contact Person to a BP multiple time with different function/dept
entry.content:
Hello,

I need some help regarding BP contact persons in S4 Hana. The migration process from ECC has resulted in a new BP contact person being created for each customer contact person in ECC. In some cases we have the same person created multiple times because of the different department and functions they were assigned in ECC. 

We would like to stop this practice and just create one BP contact person for John Smith, say number 123. 

A BUR001 relationship would then be created making 123 a contact person for an organisation, 4444. The department and function assigned would make it the delivery contact. 

Another BUR001 relationship would then be created making 123 a contact person for 4444. The department and function assigned would make it the pricing contact.

Another BUR001 relationship for the same objects, but the dept and function make it the quality contact. 

It is possible to have one contact person assigned to multiple accounts. But not to have one contact person assigned multiple times to one account. 

When you try this S4 gives the error "Relationship already exists; further interval not possible"

Any suggestions on how to solve this issue? I cannot see a standard method. 

Thanks 

Phil

entry.title: OP_API_OUTBOUND_DELIVERY_SRV_0002 not able to pack or unpack HU items (Existing HUs)
entry.content:
During our implementation of OP_API_OUTBOUND_DELIVERY_SRV_0002 we have not found a way to create HU Items for existing Handling units via the delivery API. API Documentation only gives an example of simultaneous HU header & HU item creation via one batch request here, however our use case changing HU content after initial creation is not met.

Looking into using the Handling Unit API though it would be ideal to have this functionality included in the delivery API.

A post request on just HU items without HU header returns error "No header found for the HandlingUnitExternalId". 

 

 

 

{
   "error":{
      "code":"LOHUM_DEL_API/002",
      "message":{
         "lang":"en",
         "value":"No header found for the HandlingUnitExternalId 00000000000300000208"
      }
   }  
}

 

 

 

A batch request that includes PUT or PATCH on the HU header+ POST request(s) for new HU item returns error "HTTP method 'PUT' is not supported by this entityset (HU Header)". 

 

 

 

 

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

entry.title: Upgrade from R/3 to S/4 - Payroll and Time advices
entry.content:
Dear Gurus,

did you upgraded you R/3 payroll and time solution ?

Any advice how to do it smoothly ?

What about an existing integration between R/3 and SF to be upgrade to S/4 ?

Thanks in advance.

Kind Regards,

Lucien.

entry.title: ALTER USER Statement on HANA DB
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

Based on the SAP Note: 1702224 - Disable password lifetime for technical users,
I am considering running the following statement:

ALTER USER SYSTEM DISABLE PASSWORD LIFETIME.

Can anyone help me with the questions below?
- Does this take effect immediately without restarting the system?
- Are there any prerequisites or concerns before running the command on the production system?

entry.title: SAP BAS, sap/hana-client and SAP HANA on-prem: “Cannot resolve host name”
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

We are trying to access our SAP HANA on-premise database within SAP BAS, but we are already having problems logging in because the host cannot be resolved:

 

 

Error: Connection failed (RTE:[89001] Cannot resolve host name 'hana.on_prem.local' rc=-2: Name or service not known (hana.on_prem.local))

 

 

 

Here is the small mini script (nodejs sap/hana-client):

If we run this code locally in VS Code while we are in the company network, the host can be resolved and we can successfully connect to our SAP HANA on-premise, so we suspect the error is in the BTP or CloudConnector.


The associated Cloud Connector in the BTP subaccount is properly set up and "reachable":

 

 


 

 Do we need to specify anything else in the parameters for the “conn.connect…” call?
Perhaps location_id or something similar?

Is our assumption correct that “conn.connect…” uses a TCP connection?

Do we then need SOCKS5? If so, how do we set this up?

https://help.sap.com/docs/connectivity/sap-btp-connectivity-cf/using-tcp-protocol-for-cloud-applications?q=socks5

We are grateful for any advice!

Many thanks and best regards,

Marco

entry.title: Not able to login to ABAP ADT
entry.content:
Hi team,

I am not able to login to my BTP trail account. Everytime I click on eclipse "Copy to Clipboard" buttona adn open link in browser either in incog or normal. its asking for id and password and upon providing the credentials, again asking for same creds.

note: my btp trail account has almost 50 days left out of 90 days free trial, tried incog window as well.

Requesting your help on this

entry.title: Refresh Option in reports
entry.content:
Dear all, 

In some reports there is an option of refreshing report.

Need to add same option to FMRP_RW_BUDCON, please suggest how to make it

entry.title: Equal Workload distribution to HANA Scale out database servers.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

There are 8 databases in HANA 2.0 SP05 Rev 59 DB scale out environment.

I noticed a SQL query is running on the particular db server and spike up CPU /Memory more while other DB hosts are less utilized.

* How to equalize that SQL execution to all DB hosts. Please provide more details if there is a solution.

* if one DB host is spiked up, will it hang the whole DB response to application server?

Please answer.

Thanks in advance
